agenda.emptyDescription: Add an event with the New button, or jump to another date.

dragHint.title: Tip: drag with a modifier
dragHint.body: Hold Ctrl while dragging to duplicate, or Alt to move the whole series.

grid.ariaLabel: Events. Use the arrow keys to move between events, Enter to open.

deleteContext.title: Remove this context window?
deleteContext.description: Items keep their Context — only this time-block is removed from the calendar. The Context itself stays in the sidebar.

deleteTask.title: Delete this task?
deleteTask.description: This removes the task, its subtasks, and any blocks it placed on the calendar.

multiSelectHint.title: Multiple events selected
multiSelectHint.description: Drag any one to move them together. Hold Alt for the whole series, Ctrl to duplicate. Press ? for all shortcuts.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.macHint: On macOS, use ⌘ in place of Ctrl.

items.moveDay: Move to the next / previous day
items.resize: Resize (drag the top or bottom edge)
items.create: Create an event in an empty slot
items.wholeSeries: Act on the whole recurring series
items.nudgeTime: Reschedule the focused event by 15 min
items.nudgeDay: Move the focused event a day earlier / later

present.banner: Present mode — showing only what a public viewer sees

sidebar.sharedToggleAria: Shared context — you both attend and can edit
sidebar.sharedHelp: You both attend and can edit every event in it.
sidebar.personalHelp: Only on your calendar; only you can edit its events.
sidebar.sharedBadgeAria: Shared context — both attend and can edit
sidebar.sharedBadgeTooltip: Shared — you both attend and can edit
sidebar.filtersDescription: Show or hide calendars and contexts.

deleteContext.title: Delete this context?
deleteContext.description: “{name}” and its calendar time-blocks will be removed; its items become uncategorized. You can undo this.

convert.makeSharedDescription: You’ll both see and edit every event in “{name}”, and they’ll show on both calendars.
convert.makePersonalDescription: “{name}” returns to your calendar only. Events {otherName} added here stay theirs and leave your shared view.
